Part.Source:
Event Start
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
EmpCod.Visible = False FilCod.Visible = False CreCheCod.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &CfgVlr = RetornaConfSistema.UDP(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon020_ClientePadraoVista) &VistaCreCliCod = iif(&CfgVlr = '', 0, val(&CfgVlr))
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod if CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP TextBlockTitle.Caption = 'CHEQUE: ' + trim(CreDupNro) Else TextBlockTitle.Caption = 'DUPLICATA: ' + trim(CreDupNro) Endif
Form.Caption = CreDupNro.Trim()
ttbPaga.Visible = 0 ttbRene.Visible = 0
if CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA CreCbrCod.Visible = 0 CreCbrNom.Visible = 0 CreCbrImp.Visible = 0 Endif
//RENEGOCIACAO For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod,CreRenCod ttbRene.Visible = 1 Exit EndFor
//PAGAMENTO For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod,CrePagCod
ttbPaga.Visible = 1 Exit endFor
Exit EndFor
EndEvent
Event Load
CreCliRaz.Link = VerCliente.Link('', EmpCod, CreCliCod) CreVenNom.Link = VerCliente.Link('', EmpCod, CreVenCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber) CreIsPer.Visible = False CreIsPer_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else CreIsPer.Visible = True CreIsPer_Cell.Class = !'CellPaddingLeft10' EndIf If Not (CreCliCod = &VistaCreCliCod) CreNovCliRaz.Visible = False CreNovCliRaz_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else CreNovCliRaz.Visible = True CreNovCliRaz_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6' EndIf If Not (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC) CreCarBanCod.Visible = False CreCarBanCod_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else CreCarBanCod.Visible = True CreCarBanCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC) CreCarCreDeb.Visible = False CreCarCreDeb_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else CreCarCreDeb.Visible = True CreCarCreDeb_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC) CreCarNroAut.Visible = False CreCarNroAut_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else CreCarNroAut.Visible = True CreCarNroAut_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf
If not(CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP) DVPanel_tbDadosCheque_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_tbDadosCheque_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 CellMarginTop' EndIf tbObsche.Visible = (&CheCod = 0)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
If CreCheCod <> 0 &EmpCod = EmpCod &CheCod = CreCheCod Do 'GetDadosCheque' EndIf
EndEvent
Event 'DoActionReturn'
Do Case Case &deOndeVem.IsEmpty() Dashboard.Link() Case &deOndeVem = 'RETURN' Return Otherwise &link = &deOndeVem.Trim() + '.aspx' link(&Link) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoEditarDuplicata'
do 'Editar'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoImprimirDuplicata'
Do 'Imprimir'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoEnviarEmail'
do 'Email'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoDoAdiconarObs'
wwcobrarObs.Popup(TrnMode.Insert, EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod)
wcObservacao.Refresh()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event gxUITabsPanel_tbDupl.TabChanged
&numeric = gxUITabsPanel_tbDupl.ActivePage Do Case Case &numeric = 2 //PAGAMENTO wcPagamentos.Object = wcDuplicataPagamentos.Create(TrnMode.Display, EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod)
wcrenegociadas.Object = wcRenegociacoes.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod)
Case &numeric = 3 //OBSERVACOES wcObservacao.Object = wcDuplicataObservacao.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) EndCase
EndEvent
Sub 'Editar'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod Do CAse CAse CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET and CreCheCod <> 0 wpLancarCheque1.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CreCheCod) CAse CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP and CreCheCod <> 0 wpLancarChequeProprio.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CreCheCod) Otherwise AddDuplicatas.Link('RETURN', 'UPD', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) EndCase
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'Imprimir'
For each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod // where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where FilCod = &FilCod // Where CreCod = &CreCod If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA msg('ATENÇÃO! Duplicata cancelada verifique!') Else Do case Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem)
GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto)
If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF
Case CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA and (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreBloNro <> '') &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem)
GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto)
If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF
Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirDuplicata and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtDuplicata.Clear() &sdtDuplicatasItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtDuplicatasItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtDuplicatasItem.FilCod = FilCod &sdtDuplicata.Add(&sdtDuplicatasItem) &webSession.Set('IMPRIMEDUPLICATA',&sdtDuplicata.ToXml())
RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS019.link(EmpCod,FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False)
Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.NaoFazerNada or CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA Msg('ATENÇÃO! Tipo de impressão no local de cobrança selecionado como "NADA A FAZER", altere o tipo de impressão caso necessário.') EndCase EndIf
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'Email'
For each Order EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod // where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where FilCod = &FilCod // Where CreCod = &CreCod
If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtBoleto.Clear() &sdtBoletoItem = new() &sdtBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtBoleto.Add(&sdtBoletoItem)
GerarBoleto.call(&sdtBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto)
if &IsErro = false &WebSession.Set('wpEnviaBoleto', &sdtBoleto.Toxml()) wpEnviaBoleto.Popup()
EndIF EndIF Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetDadosCheque'
For Each order EmpCod, CheCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CheCod = &CheCod
&CheBanCod = CheBanCod &CheAgeCod = CheAgeCod &CheCon = CheCon &CheNro = CheNro &CheVlr = CheVlr &CheDtaEmi = CheDtaEmi &CheDtaVct = CheDtaVct &CheTitNom = CheTitNom &CheTitCpf = CheTitCpf &CheTitRg = CheTitRg &CheTel = CheTel &CheCmc = CheCmc
&CheTip = CheTip &TalCod = TalCod &TalCtabanCod = TalCtabanCod &CheCom = CheCom
&CheMot = CheMot
Exit // When none // &CheTip = TipoCheque.Terceiro // // RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &TCon044_PlanoRecCliente) // &ChePlanCod = RetornaCodigoPadraoPlano.Udp(&TCon044_PlanoRecCliente, &EmpCod) EndFor
EndSub
